Blackjack

Balance$0.00
Dealer
—
Your Hands
Choose chip — main bet
Bet: $0
Perfect Pairs (optional)
Side: $0
Min $1 · Max $500 · Side bet max $100

Rules

6-deck shoe. Dealer hits soft 17. Blackjack pays 3:2.
Double on any 2 cards. Split a pair (one re-split allowed via dealing two new hands).
Insurance pays 2:1 when dealer shows Ace.

Perfect Pairs Side Bet

Perfect (same rank+suit): 25:1
Coloured (same rank+colour): 12:1
Mixed (same rank): 6:1
